data.title: Fundstrat’s Tom Lee Says Two Factors Preventing Bitcoin From Going to the ‘Moon’ Despite Heavy Demand From ETFs
data.description:

data.title: TD9 Setup On Bitcoin Price Chart Suggests It Could Take 4 Years To Reach $149,000 — Details
data.description:
According to a new analysis shared by crypto analyst Tony “The Bull” Severino, Bitcoin has just closed the quarterly chart with a perfected TD9 sell setup. This is actually interesting, because it adds a possibly long timeline before Bitcoin can reach any further significant price target. Most of Bitcoin’s daily candles in the past seven days have shown mild upward pressure supported by positive sentiment from various technical analyses. However, according to the TD9 setup, Bitcoin could take up to four years to reach $149,000
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-4-years-rise-to-149000/

data.title: XRP Trading Volume Skyrockets 56% in a Single Day. Ripple Bulls Gearing Up for a Major Push Toward the $3 Mark
data.description:
The trading volume for XRP experienced a remarkable surge, soaring by an impressive 56% within just one day. This significant increase in trading activity indicates a heightened interest among investors, as Ripple's bullish supporters appear to be positioning themselves for a substantial movement in the market. With their sights set firmly on the $3 mark, these Ripple enthusiasts are preparing for what could be a pivotal moment in XRP's price trajectory, potentially leading to an exciting rally that may capture the attention of traders and analysts alike.
source: https://blocknews.com/xrp-trading-volume-skyrockets-56-in-a-single-day-ripple-bulls-gearing-up-for-a-major-push-toward-the-3-mark/

data.title: BoE Governor Warns Stablecoin Boom Could Undermine Monetary Trust – Central Banks on Alert
data.description:
BoE Governor Andrew Bailey has argued that modern reserve currencies rely on central-bank liquidity and secure assets, not fixed pegs, and has cautioned that stablecoins circulating outside regulation could undermine the "singleness of money," challenging monetary trust and policy coordination.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/boe-governor-warns-stablecoin-boom-may-hurt-monetary-trust/

data.title: Arbitrum vs Optimism: Ethereum’s Top Layer-2s Go Head-to-Head
data.description:
In the rapidly evolving landscape of blockchain technology, a significant showdown is unfolding between Arbitrum and Optimism, two of Ethereum’s leading layer-2 solutions. As developers and users alike seek to enhance scalability, reduce transaction costs, and improve overall performance on the Ethereum network, both Arbitrum and Optimism have emerged as front-runners in this competitive arena. With their unique approaches to addressing the challenges of Ethereum's congestion and high fees, these projects are not only vying for dominance among the decentralized finance (DeFi) applications but also shaping the future of Ethereum itself. In this exciting contest, the advantages and limitations of each layer-2 solution will be put to the test as they strive to capture the attention and support of the ever-growing blockchain community.
source: https://blocknews.com/arbitrum-vs-optimism-ethereums-top-layer-2s-go-head-to-head/
